task_completion.description: The Data Probe module or tool is visible in the 3D Slicer interface, indicating the agent is actively sampling voxel intensities.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Data Probe panel (usually in the bottom left corner of the 3D Slicer GUI) showing coordinates and background/foreground intensity values (HU).

task_completion.description: A text file named intensity_measurements.txt is created and opened in a text editor or terminal.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., gedit, nano, VS Code) or terminal window showing a file named 'intensity_measurements.txt' being edited or viewed.

task_completion.description: The text file contains the required formatting structure for the organ measurements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains lines formatted exactly as 'Aorta: [value] HU', 'Liver: [value] HU', and 'Spleen: [value] HU'.

task_completion.description: The text file includes an interpretation line.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains a line starting with 'Interpretation: ' followed by some assessment text.

task_completion.description: The recorded Hounsfield Unit (HU) value for the Aorta falls within the expected physiological range (including tolerance).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file shows 'Aorta: [value] HU' where [value] is a number between 120 and 280.

task_completion.description: The recorded Hounsfield Unit (HU) value for the Liver falls within the expected physiological range (including tolerance).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file shows 'Liver: [value] HU' where [value] is a number between 10 and 110.

task_completion.description: The recorded Hounsfield Unit (HU) value for the Spleen falls within the expected physiological range (including tolerance).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file shows 'Spleen: [value] HU' where [value] is a number between 10 and 90.

integrity.description: The agent used the 3D Slicer GUI to find the measurements rather than guessing or hallucinating values.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the 3D Slicer application open with the CT scan loaded and the crosshairs positioned over anatomical structures at some point in the trajectory.

integrity.description: The agent actually performed the measurements instead of writing a script to output hardcoded values without checking the images.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent's terminal or editor history does not show them simply echoing or pasting pre-calculated values without first interacting with the Slicer GUI.

integrity.description: The output file is saved in the correct directory (~/Documents/SlicerData/).
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor or terminal shows the file path as '~/Documents/SlicerData/intensity_measurements.txt' or the absolute equivalent.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected Hounsfield Unit (HU) ranges for the organs are: Aorta (150-250 HU), Liver (40-80 HU), and Spleen (40-60 HU). A tolerance of 30 HU is applied to these ranges to account for physiological variation. Therefore, acceptable ranges are: Aorta (120-280 HU), Liver (10-110 HU), and Spleen (10-90 HU).
